ProtectConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the protect configuration.

ProtectConfigurationId.description: The unique identifier for the protect configuration.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The time when the protect configuration was created, in UNIX epoch time format.

AccountDefault.description: This is true if the protect configuration is set as your account default protect configuration.

DeletionProtectionEnabled.description: When set to true deletion protection is enabled. By default this is set to false.

Tags.description: An array of key and value pair tags that are associated with the resource.

RegistrationAttachmentArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the registration attachment.

RegistrationAttachmentId.description: The unique identifier for the registration attachment.

AttachmentStatus.description:
The status of the registration attachment.

  • UPLOAD_IN_PROGRESS The attachment is being uploaded.

  • UPLOAD_COMPLETE The attachment has been uploaded.

  • UPLOAD_FAILED The attachment failed to uploaded.

  • DELETED The attachment has been deleted..

Tags.description: An array of tags (key and value pairs) to associate with the registration attachment.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The time when the registration attachment was created, in UNIX epoch time format.

DefaultProtectConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the account default protect configuration.

DefaultProtectConfigurationId.description: The unique identifier of the account default protect configuration.

MonthlyLimit.description: The current monthly limit, in US dollars.

The current monthly limit, in US dollars.

PoolArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the pool that is now associated with the origination identity.

PoolId.description: The PoolId of the pool that is now associated with the origination identity.

OriginationIdentityArn.description: The PhoneNumberArn or SenderIdArn of the origination identity.

OriginationIdentity.description: The PhoneNumberId or SenderId of the origination identity.

IsoCountryCode.description: The two-character code, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format, for the country or region.

ConfigurationSetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the configuration set.

ProtectConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the protect configuration.

ProtectConfigurationId.description: The unique identifier for the protect configuration.

E164PhoneNumber.description: The phone number in E164 format, sanitized from the original input by removing any formatting characters.

DialingCountryCode.description: The numeric dialing code for the country or region where the phone number was originally registered.

IsoCountryCode.description: The two-character code, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format, for the country or region where the phone number was originally registered.

Country.description: The name of the country where the phone number was originally registered.

MCC.description: The phone number's mobile country code, for mobile phone number types

MNC.description: The phone number's mobile network code, for mobile phone number types.

Carrier.description: The carrier or service provider that the phone number is currently registered with. In some countries and regions, this value may be the carrier or service provider that the phone number was originally registered with.

PhoneNumberType.description: Describes the type of phone number. Valid values are: MOBILE, LANDLINE, OTHER, and INVALID. Avoid sending SMS or voice messages to INVALID phone numbers, as these numbers are unlikely to belong to actual recipients.

ConfigurationSetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the newly created configuration set.

ConfigurationSetName.description: The name of the new configuration set.

Tags.description: An array of key and value pair tags that's associated with the configuration set.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The time when the configuration set was created, in UNIX epoch time format.

EventDestination.description: The details of the destination where events are logged.

OptOutListArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the OptOutList.

Tags.description: An array of tags (key and value pairs) associated with the new OptOutList.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The time when the pool was created, in UNIX epoch time format.

PoolArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the pool.

Status.description:
The current status of the pool.

  • CREATING: The pool is currently being created and isn't yet available for use.

  • ACTIVE: The pool is active and available for use.

  • DELETING: The pool is being deleted.

MessageType.description: The type of message for the pool to use.

TwoWayEnabled.description: By default this is set to false. When set to true you can receive incoming text messages from your end recipients.

TwoWayChannelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the two way channel.

TwoWayChannelRole.description: An optional IAM Role Arn for a service to assume, to be able to post inbound SMS messages.

SelfManagedOptOutsEnabled.description: By default this is set to false. When set to false, and an end recipient sends a message that begins with HELP or STOP to one of your dedicated numbers, End User MessagingSMS automatically replies with a customizable message and adds the end recipient to the OptOutList. When set to true you're responsible for responding to HELP and STOP requests. You're also responsible for tracking and honoring opt-out requests.

OptOutListName.description: The name of the OptOutList associated with the pool.

SharedRoutesEnabled.description: Indicates whether shared routes are enabled for the pool. Set to false and only origination identities in this pool are used to send messages.

DeletionProtectionEnabled.description: When set to true deletion protection is enabled. By default this is set to false.

Tags.description: An array of tags (key and value pairs) associated with the pool.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The time when the pool was created, in UNIX epoch time format.

RegistrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the registration.

RegistrationType.description: The type of registration form to create. The list of RegistrationTypes can be found using the DescribeRegistrationTypeDefinitions action.

RegistrationStatus.description:
The status of the registration.

  • CLOSED: The phone number or sender ID has been deleted and you must also delete the registration for the number.

  • CREATED: Your registration is created but not submitted.

  • COMPLETE: Your registration has been approved and your origination identity has been created.

  • DELETED: The registration has been deleted.

  • PROVISIONING: Your registration has been approved and your origination identity is being created.

  • REQUIRES_AUTHENTICATION: You need to complete email authentication.

  • REQUIRES_UPDATES: You must fix your registration and resubmit it.

  • REVIEWING: Your registration has been accepted and is being reviewed.

  • SUBMITTED: Your registration has been submitted and is awaiting review.

CurrentVersionNumber.description: The current version number of the registration.

AdditionalAttributes.description: Metadata about a given registration which is specific to that registration type.

Tags.description: An array of tags (key and value pairs) to associate with the registration.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The time when the registration was created, in UNIX epoch time format.

RegistrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the registration.

RegistrationType.description: The type of registration form. The list of RegistrationTypes can be found using the DescribeRegistrationTypeDefinitions action.

ResourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the origination identity that is associated with the registration.

ResourceId.description: The unique identifier for the origination identity. For example this could be a PhoneNumberId or SenderId.

ResourceType.description: The registration type or origination identity type.

IsoCountryCode.description: The two-character code, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format, for the country or region.

PhoneNumber.description: The phone number associated with the registration in E.164 format.

RegistrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the registration.

VersionNumber.description: The new version number of the registration.

RegistrationVersionStatus.description:
The status of the registration.

  • APPROVED: Your registration has been approved.

  • ARCHIVED: Your previously approved registration version moves into this status when a more recently submitted version is approved.

  • DENIED: You must fix your registration and resubmit it.

  • DISCARDED: You've abandon this version of their registration to start over with a new version.

  • DRAFT: The initial status of a registration version after it’s created.

  • REQUIRES_AUTHENTICATION: You need to complete email authentication.

  • REVIEWING: Your registration has been accepted and is being reviewed.

  • REVOKED: Your previously approved registration has been revoked.

  • SUBMITTED: Your registration has been submitted.

RegistrationVersionStatusHistory.description: A RegistrationVersionStatusHistory object that contains timestamps for the registration.
